title: isoloma × ortgiesii
intro: Isoloma × ortgiesii, also known as Isoloma ortgiesii, is a hybrid plant species within the family Cystopteridaceae, commonly found in mountainous regions of Europe, particularly in the Swiss Alps. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Isoloma × ortgiesii include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory problems, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it has also been used in folk medicine as a compress or poultice to apply directly to affected areas.
